answers: Hydrogen fuel uses hydrogen gas as an energy carrier. When hydrogen reacts with oxygen in a fuel cell, it produces electricity with only water as a byproduct — completely clean.
Hydrogen fuel holo hydrogen gas ke energy source hisebe use kora. Green hydrogen renewable energy diye produce hoy, eta future er fuel hote pare.
Hydrogen can be used in fuel cells for vehicles, power generation, and industrial processes. Green hydrogen (made using renewable energy) is considered key to decarbonization.
Hydrogen fuel produces zero emissions at the point of use. The challenge is producing it cleanly and storing it efficiently, but it's a major focus of clean energy research.
